notes: AKB-15 r3 — SINGLE VOICE throughout: Alice only (Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2). No Liam. Video leads with audience autofill as standout feature. Short v2/v3 clips used for s01, s04, s07, s08 to fit within visual windows.

steps.display_text: The Spinner Wheel's standout feature: your audience submits entries from their phones and the wheel fills itself automatically.
steps.tts_text: The Spinner Wheel's standout feature: your audience submits entries from their phones and the wheel fills itself automatically.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Spinner Wheel from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Check Participant name autofill — the wheel fills itself with every participant's name as they join. No typing needed.
steps.tts_text: Check Participant name autofill — the wheel fills with every name as participants join.

steps.display_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.
steps.tts_text: Or prefer a fixed list? Type entries one per line in the Entries field, or paste a whole list at once.

steps.display_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.
steps.tts_text: Click Save — each entry appears as a coloured segment on the wheel.

steps.display_text: Use Spin time to set how long the wheel spins — up to 1,200 seconds for maximum suspense.
steps.tts_text: Spin time controls how long the wheel spins — up to twelve hundred seconds.

steps.display_text: Hit Present, then press the centre of the wheel to spin. The winner is revealed!
steps.tts_text: Hit Present, press the centre of the wheel, and the winner is revealed!

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i spinner-wheel-r3b-final.webm -i s01_v2.mp3 -i s02.mp3 -i s03.mp3 -i s04_v2.mp3 -i s05.mp3 -i s06.mp3 -i s07_v3.mp3 -i s08_v2.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=7000|7000[a2];[3:a]adelay=10000|10000[a3];[4:a]adelay=14300|14300[a4];[5:a]adelay=20500|20500[a5];[6:a]adelay=27500|27500[a6];[7:a]adelay=32200|32200[a7];[8:a]adelay=37500|37500[a8];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8]amix=inputs=8:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k spinner-wheel-r3b-narrated.webm
